entries.title: Lopebook Gallery
entries.description: Browse, search, and curate lopecode notebooks. Push content and assets to GitHub.

entries.title: Cell Map
entries.description: Interactive force-directed graph visualization of all cells and their dataflow dependencies across loaded modules.

entries.title: Jumpgate
entries.description: Converts ObservableHQ notebooks into self-contained offline-first HTML files, optionally pushed to GitHub.

entries.title: Lopecode Vision
entries.description: Design document exploring lopecode as a platform for immortal, durable, offline-first interactive software.

entries.title: Manipulate
entries.description: Direct manipulation as the inverse of data visualization. Drag points on Observable Plot charts to edit underlying data.

entries.title: Notes
entries.description: Offline-first note-taking app with local IndexedDB storage that can export itself with all notes into a single file.

entries.title: Reactive Reflective Testing
entries.description: Testing methodology for reactive notebooks — unit tests, runtime introspection, and invariant checking with zero rebuild overhead.

entries.title: Robocoop 2
entries.description: In-notebook AI coding assistant that reads reactive cell values and screenshots to write code collaboratively.

entries.title: Robocoop 3
entries.description: Agent-as-function AI coding assistant with multi-provider support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama) and agentic loop.

entries.title: Sequencer
entries.description: Browser-based drum sequencer with touch-optimized pads, BPM control, Web Audio playback, and downloadable state.

entries.title: Unaggregating Cloudwatch Metrics
entries.description: Reconstruct individual data points from aggregated CloudWatch metric bins to reveal hidden outliers and traffic patterns.

entries.title: Animated Kirigami
entries.description: Wouldn't it be nice if the paper folded itself? A demo of UI automation.

entries.title: Atlas
entries.description: Runtime overview showing all loaded notebooks, modules, and their interconnections.

entries.title: Hacker Favourites Analysis
entries.description: Most favorited Hackernews articles of all time

entries.title: Lazer Simulator
entries.description: Animated Three.js laser trail effect with color-cycling Lissajous curves and glowing comet-tail decay.

entries.title: Lopecode Tour
entries.description: Guided introduction to lopecode — self-serialization, programmable prose, reactive dataviz, multi-document architecture, and AI collaboration.

entries.title: Module Selection
entries.description: UI explorer for browsing, selecting, and dynamically loading modules into the running lopepage layout.

entries.title: Blank
entries.description: Starter template notebook, ready for new lopecode work.

entries.title: Bulk Jumpgate
entries.description: Bulk export Observable 1.0 notebooks to self-contained local HTML files using the File System Access API.

entries.title: Debugger
entries.description: Moldable development tool that visualizes cell state transitions on a timeline to debug dataflow problems.

entries.title: Editor 5
entries.description: Reactive in-notebook code editor (CodeMirror 6) for live-editing and saving cells without leaving the notebook.

entries.title: Exporter 2
entries.description: Serializes lopecode notebooks with all dependencies into a single downloadable HTML file that works offline.

entries.title: Fileattachments
entries.description: Attach local files directly to a notebook for offline use, with full programmatic FileAttachment API access.

entries.title: Local Change History
entries.description: Version history and time-travel for lopecode notebooks — records every cell change as git commits in an in-browser repository.

entries.title: Lopepage
entries.description: GoldenLayout-based multi-panel UI shell that renders lopecode modules as resizable, URL-addressable panes.

entries.title: Lopepage Urls
entries.description: Encodes and decodes the hash URL DSL used by lopepage to specify multi-module panel layouts.

entries.title: Most Favorited Hacker News Youtube Videos
Observables Now Temporal Spacing Is 60 Frames Per Second
Svg Boinger
entries.description: Psychedelic animated SVG art — rainbow circles on Lissajous paths with rotating green rectangles.

entries.title: Synchronizing External State Into Bigquery Efficiently
Observablejs Toolchain
entries.description: Bidirectional compiler/decompiler between Observable JavaScript source cells and runtime variables.
